main.description: Read and decrypt an operator-trusted SecureVault envelope by manifest CID. This endpoint requires operator authorization. When a ciphertext CID is supplied, it must match the manifest before decryption. If this node has a current manifest pointer for the ciphertext CID, stale manifest CIDs are rejected. Deleted manifests are reported as gone when a cleanup tombstone is retained.

ct_cid.description: Optional expected ciphertext CID. If present, the server rejects a manifest that points to a different ciphertext.

recipient.description: Visible-ASCII recipient DID or key id used to select the DEK wrap. Defaults to the node operator DID.

ct_cid.description: CID of the ciphertext block referenced by the manifest.

manifest_cid.description: CID of the envelope manifest used for this read.

recipient.description: Recipient DID or key id whose wrapped DEK was used.

data_b64.description: Base64-encoded plaintext bytes returned after envelope decryption.
